text:
On a sunny afternoon, Timmy decided to ride his bike through the enchanted forest behind his house. As he pedaled, the trees swayed gently and tiny songs sung from hidden birds filled the air. After what seemed like hours, Timmy came upon a sparkling stream.

He stopped, leaned in, and listened. The water was laughing, telling tales of the forest’s history. Timmy thought it sounded quite fascinating. That evening, he’d regale his teddy bear, Sparklemoonnie, with all he’d heard.

Then Timmy saw something peculiar. A butterfly flitted towards him, its color changing like the rainbow after rain. Trembling with excitement, he reached out, but the butterfly just tickled his finger, fluttering away into the sunset.

That night, Timmy dreamt he flew like the butterfly. In his dreams, he explored mysterious gardens where flowers sang songs, and animals spoke languages unknown to humankind.

When he woke up, he said, “
